📚 a community for women

gals who read

Discuss, recommend and inspire other gals with your favourite books!!! Gals Who Read is a book club with honest reviews and recommendations!! Chat about the books you just can't put down or find some inspo for your next holiday!!

2019
why gals who read?

books are better discussed together

whether you're a one-a-week reader or you've had the same book on your nightstand for six months, Gals Who Read is a no-judgement space to talk about your favourite reads!! whether you like murder mysteries, fantasy, self help or even spicy books and more, chat to our gals and find your next read!! get monthly picks, swap recommendations and finally have people to talk to about that ending.
